site.description: We are a youth nonprofit band on a mission to spread joy through music and support those in need.
site.name: Space Heard Us

home.contactText: Send us a message for performances, collaboration, or volunteer questions.
home.heroSubtitle: Space Heard Us is an inclusive youth nonprofit band in Fairfax, VA, using music to celebrate every child's gifts, bring hope to the community, and remind Northern Virginia that every voice matters.
home.missionText: Space Heard Us brings children together to share hope, joy, and connection through music. We believe every child has a voice worth hearing.
home.volunteerText: Join our team of volunteers and be part of something meaningful.
